g.text: NeuroMed-XAI Benchmark: leakage-aware EEG benchmark route with interpretable evidence

text.style: fill: #667085; font: 8.5px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Research pain point: EEG medical AI is often hard to audit because leakage, preprocessing choices, metrics, and explanation evidence are not reported in one reproducible route.
